title: Ticket 07 - Deliver presentation
description: Dummy data for Ticket 07 - deliver presentation (V01) in the DoomScrollQuiz.

questions.prompt: In Ticket 07 the expert statement appears: "Classify and apply presentation delivery reliably in daily operations." What did he say?

options.text: We should clearly understand presentation delivery in daily work and implement it properly.
options.explanation: This summarizes the core idea directly and in a practical way.

options.text: We can ignore presentation delivery as long as there is no time pressure.
options.explanation: The topic should not be postponed or waited out.

options.text: Only team management is allowed to deal with presentation delivery.
options.explanation: That makes the topic unnecessarily exclusive and misses the learning goal.

options.text: Presentation delivery only becomes relevant after the project ends.
options.explanation: The learning goal must be applied in daily operations.

questions.prompt: Which response best fits Ticket 07 for presentation delivery?

options.text: Briefly align, document cleanly and make the next step clear.
options.explanation: This combines clarification, transparency and actionable execution.

options.text: Write nothing down at first and decide later by gut feeling.
options.explanation: That would be imprecise and risky here.

options.text: Only address problems once they have fully escalated.
options.explanation: The right direction is to clarify early rather than escalate late.

options.text: Avoid clarifying questions even when the goal is still unclear.
options.explanation: The learning goal demands clarity, not silent guessing.
